title: Defile: Best By
description: Defile's Funeral ink expires over time
body:
Makes funeral ink from [Defile](https://modrinth.com/mod/defile) by doctor4t slowly disappear over time, so you don't have to clean it all up manually.

Expiration is based on random ticks, so increasing random tick speed will make ink expire faster. At default random tick speed (3), funeral ink takes on average roughly 5 minutes to expire. Funeral ink expires faster in rain and does not expire at all if black rain is active.

[Undefile](https://modrinth.com/mod/undefile) and [Refine](https://modrinth.com/mod/refine) were made to the same problem, check them out!
